name: OUSD (Origin Dollar)
description: Rebasing stablecoin backed by USDC via Vault strategies

name: crvUSD (Curve USD)
description: CDP stablecoin with LLAMMA soft-liquidation, multi-market collateral

name: USG (Tangent Finance)
description: Early-stage crvUSD-architecture CDP stablecoin. Borrowers mint USG against stablecoin Curve-LP collateral (StakeDAO / Convex-FXN / Curve gauges) across 12 markets; peg held by two PegKeeper pools (USG/USDC, USG/frxUSD). ~half of backing is protocol-owned PegKeeper liquidity.

name: USDD (Decentralized USD)
description: MakerDAO-fork stablecoin backed by TRX/USDT vaults and HTX Smart Allocator

name: syrupUSDC (Maple)
description: ERC-4626 share over Maple's institutional open-term lending pool

name: syrupUSDT (Maple)
description: ERC-4626 share over Maple's institutional open-term lending pool, USDT-denominated. Sister product to syrupUSDC.

name: apxUSD (Apyx)
description: RWA-backed synthetic stablecoin (non-yield) over Strategy STRC + cash + SATA. Sister product apyUSD captures yield. Pairs cross-link.

name: apyUSD (Apyx)
description: ERC-4626 yield-bearing wrapper around apxUSD. Captures STRC dividend pass-through; 30-day cooldown on canonical exit, DEX two-hop for retail.

name: STRC + STRCx (Strategy preferred)
chain: NYSE + Ethereum, Solana, BNB, Arbitrum, Mantle
description: Strategy's Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock (STRC) and the Backed STRCx on-chain wrapper. TradFi-extended monitor: mNAV regime, MSTR/BTC overview, STRC monthly-reset dividend, STRCx multi-chain supply, and downstream portfolio exposure (Apyx + Saturn).

name: USDat (Saturn)
description: Synthetic stablecoin from Saturn Labs. Backing is held directly by the token contract as $M (M^0 T-bill-backed) + USDC — 100% on-chain verifiable via three balanceOf reads. Sister product sUSDat captures yield.

name: sUSDat (Saturn)
description: ERC-4626 yield vault over USDat. Reserves split ~19% on-chain USDat buffer + ~81% off-chain STRC (oracle-unverified — Accountable PoR feed planned, not live). Headline 11% APY target, 30-day vesting.

name: USDai (USD.AI)
description: PYUSD-reserved synthetic dollar from Permian Labs. The USDai contract holds PYUSD directly — coverage is 100% on-chain verifiable via two reads (PYUSD.balanceOf / totalSupply), no oracle. Sister vault sUSDai carries the GPU-loan credit/yield leg.

name: sUSDai (USD.AI)
description: ERC-7540 async vault over USDai, staked into Permian's GPU/equipment-finance loan book (MetaStreet engine). totalAssets decomposes on-chain to idle + DepositTimelock escrow (committed-undrawn loans) + drawn loans. NAV-tracking yield token, not a fixed peg; 30-day epoch redemption queue.

name: USDm (Mento Dollar)
description: Reserve-backed fiat stablecoin from Mento V3. Multi-chain (Celo home, Monad spoke). Live API-driven backing; on-chain ReserveV2 sanity check on Monad.

name: Ethena USDe
description: Synthetic dollar backed by delta-hedged ETH/BTC plus stables, held across on-chain wallets, custodians, and CEX margin. Largest non-fiat-backed stablecoin tracked. Sister product sUSDe captures staking yield.

name: Ethena sUSDe
description: ERC-4626 staking vault over USDe — accrues protocol yield via rising NAV. Backed by the same reserve pool as USDe; unstaking subject to a cooldown.

name: thUSD (Theo Network)
description: Yield-bearing onchain dollar from Theo Network. Backed by thBILL @ NAV (T-Bill exposure) plus stables, plus an off-chain gold-carry leg. Two-token: thUSD ($1-pegged) + sthUSD (yield-bearing vault share, currently ~5.5% APY).
